rawAssistant: You're planning an early departure tomorrow. Make sure to recheck your lanterns and their wicks; they might have been damaged during the storm, and you won't want them failing on you mid-march. Also, consider a quick stop at the old windmill east of Hollowfen – it's always good to restock your supplies when you can.
